pages.title: Color & PBR Materials
pages.body:
# Color & PBR Materials

The preview shows a 4×4 grid of spheres demonstrating color spaces and PBR material parameters:

- Row 1: Hue rotation (H in HSL)
- Row 2: Saturation ramp (S in HSL)
- Row 3: Emissive intensity ramp
- Row 4: Metalness × roughness combinations

Three.js uses MeshStandardMaterial for physically-based rendering (PBR). Getting these parameters right is the difference between plastic-looking and photo-realistic materials.
